name: PayMongo

seo.title: PayMongo — Payment Gateway / PSP

when_to_use: GCash and Maya checkout integration for Philippine merchants
GrabPay acceptance for Southeast Asian e-commerce apps
Bank transfer collection via Philippine banking rails

cons: Limited fraud tooling vs global peers
review.verdict: Best developer-friendly gateway for Philippines checkout, covering the wallets customers actually use.
review.best_for: Philippine online merchants and SaaS needing modern API with wallet coverage
review.not_for: Enterprises needing multi-country coverage or advanced fraud/risk tooling
